raw_consumer_statement: I bought XXXX first class tickets to XXXX for XXXX. Months ahead of time on XX/XX/year> to be used on XX/XX/XXXX. When we went to fly on XX/XX/XXXX after being delayed for a few hours, our flight was cancelled. I called XXXX XXXX and they rerouted us and downgraded our flights to economy. I was told that we would be reimbursed the difference automatically. This never happened. I sent multiple emails to XXXX XXXX and at first they gave me XXXX worth of miles. When I disputed that, they gave XXXX XXXX credit and told me that was all that they would give me. Now the credit card is telling me that I am outside the 120 day window, but I am not because the service was for XX/XX/XXXX and XXXX. I am attaching the XXXX dispute that I sent to the card company.
